projects.name: AI Supastack
projects.desc: Personal reference wiki for Luis's AI software stack — 16 technology sections, inline GitHub editing, and weekly automated version sync

actions.label: Capture installed stack
actions.info: Snapshots every tool installed on this Mac (Homebrew formulae & casks, languages, etc.) into a versioned JSON file.

actions.label: Publish stack to website
actions.info: Pushes the captured stack data up to the AI Supastack site on GitHub.

actions.label: Test publish (dry run)
actions.info: Runs the publish step without pushing anything — checks it works first.

actions.label: Weekly capture (scheduled)
actions.info: The background job that auto-captures your stack once a week.

projects.name: Family Plan
projects.desc: Family logistics hub — school calendar, parental leave tracker, baby daily log, routines, health notes, and admin paperwork (Supabase auth)

projects.name: Family Trip Japan
projects.desc: Trip planning site for the family's 28-day Japan journey (Feb–Mar 2027) — itinerary, destination cards, motorhome planner, and editable research notes

projects.name: Family Week
projects.desc: Weekly family planning ritual — traditions, meals, routines, and shopping list, synced between partners via Supabase

actions.label: Run tests
actions.info: Runs the Jest test suite for Family Week.

projects.name: BYD Control
projects.desc: Remote control dashboard and CLI for the BYD Seal U DM-i — lock/unlock, charging, climate, locate, horn, and live vehicle status

actions.label: Start dashboard (dev)
actions.info: Runs the BYD car dashboard locally at localhost:3000 with live reload. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Build for production
actions.info: Compiles the web dashboard for deployment.

actions.label: Build the CLI tool
actions.info: Compiles the 'byd' command-line tool that controls the car from a terminal.

actions.label: Start dashboard (production)
actions.info: Serves the already-built dashboard at localhost:3000. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Check code style
actions.info: Runs ESLint to flag code issues.

actions.label: Run tests
actions.info: Runs the Vitest test suite.

actions.label: Run tests (watch)
actions.info: Re-runs tests automatically as files change. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.info: Scrapes Wallapop, Milanuncios and Coches.net for matching Canary-Islands campervans and updates the listings.

projects.name: BSA Options

actions.info: Pulls new Idealista/Fotocasa buyer messages, updates the sale pipeline and drafts replies for review.

actions.label: Sync sale data
actions.info: Refreshes the for-sale (venta) listing and pipeline data.

actions.label: Open command-line tool
actions.info: Opens the interactive CLI for the apartment-sale tracker. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Open sale dashboard
actions.info: Starts the local web dashboard for the sale pipeline. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Set up database
actions.info: Creates the local database — first-time setup only.

actions.label: Back up database
actions.info: Saves a timestamped copy of the local database.

actions.info: Opens a browser and logs in to your Idealista account.

actions.label: Sign in to Fotocasa
actions.info: Opens a browser and logs in to your Fotocasa account.

actions.label: Publish listing on Idealista
actions.info: Creates the apartment sale listing on Idealista.

actions.label: Publish listing on Fotocasa
actions.info: Creates the apartment sale listing on Fotocasa.

actions.label: DB upgrade: sale tracker
actions.info: One-off database migration (sale-tracker schema).

actions.label: DB upgrade: approve/send
actions.info: One-off database migration (approve/send schema).

actions.label: Run tests
actions.info: Runs the Vitest test suite.

actions.label: Run tests (watch)
actions.info: Re-runs tests as files change. Keeps running until you Stop it.

projects.name: Airnest Shared
projects.desc: Password-gated internal portal publishing CEO briefings, integration reports, and operational snapshots

projects.name: Weekly Ops Briefing
projects.desc: Automated Monday CEO briefing pipeline — Claude reads all project files + Gmail, generates a reviewed report, and emails CEO Javier Navarro after Luis approves

actions.label: Generate CEO briefing draft
actions.info: Reads all project files + Gmail, builds the Monday CEO briefing and emails the draft to you for approval.

actions.label: Check approval & send to CEO
actions.info: Looks for your approval reply, then publishes and emails the final briefing to the CEO.

projects.name: Mews API Connector
projects.desc: Certified Mews integration client (Partner INT003752) — stdlib-only Python wrappers for reservations, bills, and customers across all 8 properties

projects.name: Guesty–Mews Migration
projects.desc: Active PMS migration for all 8 Airnest properties from Guesty to Mews — API probes, field mapping, reservation imports, and per-property runbooks

actions.label: Test Mews connection
actions.info: Checks that the Mews API credentials are working.

actions.label: List Mews resources
actions.info: Fetches the resources (spaces/units) available in Mews.

actions.label: Explore the Mews API
actions.info: Probes the Mews API to map fields and endpoints for the migration.

actions.label: Inspect Mews data
actions.info: Examines the reservation/customer data structures Mews returns.

actions.label: Create a test reservation
actions.info: Creates a test reservation in Mews — writes to the live system.

projects.name: Crew Briefing
projects.desc: Automated pre-flight briefing for Binter E195-E2 — headless Playwright PDF scraper, weather and NOTAM extraction, and HTML email timed to STD−90min via launchd

actions.label: Run full pre-flight briefing
actions.info: Logs in, downloads the Binter crew PDF, extracts weather & NOTAMs, and emails you the complete pre-flight briefing.

actions.label: Run scheduled briefing now
actions.info: The same briefing in the self-removing form the scheduler fires ~90 min before departure.

actions.label: Run pipeline (raw)
actions.info: Runs the Python pipeline directly, without the iCloud-safe wrapper. For debugging.

actions.label: Schedule next briefing
actions.info: Sets up the timed job that auto-sends your briefing before the next flight.

projects.name: Flight Bag
projects.desc: Pilot operations suite — daily Binter Gmail capture and classification, Monday manual mirror with highlight promotion, and dual-mode pre-flight schedule digest

actions.label: Send schedule digest
actions.info: Emails you a digest of your upcoming Binter schedule.

actions.label: Capture Binter inbox
actions.info: Reads new Binter Gmail messages and files/classifies them into the flight bag.

actions.label: Download from Binter portal
actions.info: Logs in to the Binter crew portal and downloads the latest documents.

actions.label: Promote latest revision
actions.info: Marks the freshly downloaded document revision as the active one.

actions.label: Transfer highlights
actions.info: Moves your highlighted items into the Monday manual mirror.

actions.label: Schedule digest (evening)
actions.info: Background job: sends the schedule digest at 18:00.

actions.label: Schedule digest (morning)
actions.info: Background job: sends the digest at 05:30 on work days.

actions.label: Binter download (scheduled)
actions.info: Background job: auto-downloads from the Binter portal.

actions.label: Inbox capture (scheduled)
actions.info: Background job: auto-captures the Binter inbox daily.

projects.name: eCrew MCP

actions.label: Download my roster
actions.info: Logs in to eCrew and downloads + parses your monthly roster PDF (flights and standby duties).

actions.label: Run MCP server (dev)
actions.info: Runs the eCrew MCP server in watch mode. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Start MCP server
actions.info: Runs the built eCrew MCP server so Claude can use it. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Build
actions.info: Compiles the TypeScript MCP server.

actions.label: Run tests
actions.info: Runs the eCrew test suite.

actions.label: Pre-warm eCrew login
actions.info: Logs in ahead of time so the next roster download is fast.

actions.label: Start MCP server (script)
actions.info: Starts the MCP server via its shell wrapper. Keeps running until you Stop it.

actions.label: Pre-warm login (scheduled)
actions.info: Background job: keeps the eCrew login warm.
